items.final_wording: Supports a traceable record of review, action, responsibility, referral and handover for pathology and radiology results.

source.title: Management of Investigation Results in the Emergency Department
source.jurisdiction: United Kingdom emergency medicine; requires UAE governance and pathway adaptation
source.population: Adults and children whose pathology or radiology investigations were requested or reviewed by an emergency department.
source.setting: Emergency department result review, communication, handover and follow-up governance.
source.exclusions: Exact for recording which test was requested, the result or report review, action taken, responsibility, referral or handover and patient communication. It does not interpret a result or generate management.

exact_location.heading: Summary and pathology/radiology recommendations — traceable review and responsibility

source.evidence_paraphrase: Supports a traceable record of review, action, responsibility, referral and handover for pathology and radiology results.

items.rationale: The exact RCEM results section supports documenting why a result is being reviewed, its source or date when available, the specific test and a traceable clinician review; it does not interpret the result.

items.final_wording: Supports documenting the specific test, reviewed result or report, communication and clinician-determined follow-up action.

source.title: Management of Investigation Results in the Emergency Department
source.jurisdiction: United Kingdom emergency medicine; requires UAE governance and pathway adaptation
source.population: Adults and children whose pathology or radiology investigations were requested or reviewed by an emergency department.
source.setting: Emergency department result review, communication, handover and follow-up governance.
source.exclusions: Exact for recording which test was requested, the result or report review, action taken, responsibility, referral or handover and patient communication. It does not interpret a result or generate management.

exact_location.heading: Operational guidance — result review, patient communication, record and follow-up action

source.evidence_paraphrase: Supports documenting the specific test, reviewed result or report, communication and clinician-determined follow-up action.

items.rationale: The exact review and action section supports recording a clinician-entered plan, specialist discussion and handover or follow-up only when actually completed.
